plain:
— Intro —
Like this, yeah.
Environmental injustice
I know some brothers who clutching
They might go mental and buck it
(AGH!!)
— Intro · The Survey —
I'm tryna… have some reservations…
But I gotta serve the devil's dessert
at the table 'cause
HMM… it's an environmental injustice
I know some brothers who clutching
— Chorus —
I'm clutching on it real tight.
Homie this is my real life.
It's an environmental injustice
I know some brothers who clutching..
— Chorus · Operation Land Grab —
And I'm clutching on for dear life.
Homie this is my real life.
Don't play with me.
— Chorus —
Environmental injustice
I know some brothers who clutching
Who might go mental and BUCK BUCK!
Might go mental and BUCK!
— Verse · Ocho —
Said, we just want it back.
Back to the beginning
When everybody cared.
When everybody winning
Before they blamed the fruit,
before we started sinning.
When this land was my land
if only you could dig it
— Verse · Ocho —
But hold up let me pivot
They wanna take the church
'prolly wanna build a prison.
So really what it's giving? Villain.
The future got me
fighting for the feeling.
— Verse · Ocho —
And see my people moving
'cause they able and they willing
To stand up like a building —
for these buildings got me building.
Pillar of my era
and I'm daring him to kill him.
No reason to be scared,
be prepared for the healing.
And leave it up to God — oh yeah,
he made me in his image. YAAH!
— Bridge · Evangelist Angel —
They can't take your home away
if you're covered in blessings
Every yea every day. Every day yea every day
Look up to the sky, no need for stressing
Jesus take these thoughts away
— Bridge · Reprise — McCluster, Ocho & Evangelist Angel —
They can't take your home away
if you're covered in blessings
They can't do nothing to you,
they can't do nothing to you
We gon' stand here and fight
for what wrong and what is true
— Bridge —
They can't do nothing to you,
they can't do nothing to you
Gon' stand here and fight
for what wrong and what is true
— Song Switch · Hook 2 —
'Cause you lookin' like prey
but now I wanna pray for you,
see another day for you, yea yea
'Cause ion got the time
and I'm really on the chase —
came from GA for you, yeah yeah
